sql_array: CREATE TABLE spatial_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, geom GEOMETRY, attr VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);

INSERT INTO spatial_data (id, geom, attr) VALUES (1, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(1 1)', 4326), 'First point'), (2, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(2 2)', 4326), 'Second point'), (3, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(3 3)', 4326), 'Third point');
SELECT id, attr, bif:st_distance(geom, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(0 0)', 4326)) AS distance FROM spatial_data WHERE distance < 5 ORDER BY distance;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, attr FROM spatial_data WHERE attr IS NOT NULL) AS subquery GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT id, system('echo ' || attr) AS command_output FROM spatial_data WHERE attr IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, bif:st_distance(geom, (SELECT ST_GeomFromText(MIN(attr), 4326) FROM temporal_data WHERE attr IS NOT NULL)) AS min_distance FROM spatial_data;
CREATE TABLE temporal_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, attr VARCHAR(255), create_time TIMESTAMP);
SELECT id, bif:st_distance(geom, (SELECT geom FROM spatial_data WHERE attr = '' LIMIT 1)) AS distance FROM spatial_data WHERE geom IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, bif:st_distance(geom, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(' || CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR) || ' ' || CAST(2 AS VARCHAR) || ')', 4326)) AS distance FROM spatial_data WHERE geom IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id FROM spatial_data WHERE bif:st_distance(geom, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(1 1)', 4326)) < (SELECT AVG(bif:st_distance(geom, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(0 0)', 4326))) FROM spatial_data GROUP BY id) HAVING COUNT(NULLIF(attr, '')) = 0;
